summary: Open-source engine, SL drag fix, T&S resize fix, and whatIf order filtering.
release_notes: Published blitztrade-engine: the backend and build system are now open-source for full transparency.
Stop-loss drag-to-modify now correctly updates auxPrice instead of lmtPrice — SL orders are actually modified on TWS.
Time & Sales column no longer overflows the window when resized smaller with the drag handle.
WhatIf tradability-check orders are now filtered from the WS broadcast — no more fake orders in the orders table.
Column toggle dropdown no longer closes immediately after clicking a checkbox.
Cancel buttons moved to the Action column and always visible.
README updated with correct project structure and test file names.
